decisions.title: Context-Augmented Generation with file-based few-shot examples
decisions.context: Estimates need consistent structure and domain tone without fine-tuning a model per customer.
decisions.decision: Inject mode-specific few-shot examples from app/context/examples/ and system prompts from app/context/prompts/ into the LLM system message; client sends structured project context as the user message.
consequences: Examples version with the codebase
Prompt changes do not require model retraining
Token usage grows with mode and example count

decisions.title: v2 structured output with guarded LLM pipeline
decisions.context: Markdown-only v1 responses are harder for the web UI to render reliably; unsafe input/output must be handled explicitly.
decisions.decision: POST /api/v2/estimate uses Pydantic EstimationResult, LLMPipeline guardrails, and HTTP 422 for enforced blocks; domain mismatch may degrade with audit metadata.
consequences: Primary integration path for web/
Guardrail rollout controlled per policy via environment
More moving parts than v1

decisions.title: LiteLLM provider chain with failover
decisions.context: Multiple LLM vendors and timeouts need a single abstraction without scattering SDK calls in routers.
decisions.decision: Use app/services/llm_chain.py and ai_model_service.py with LLM_PROVIDERS order and optional static fallback.
consequences: Routers do not call OpenAI/Anthropic directly
Provider errors classified at boundary
Gemini settings exist but default chain factories are OpenAI and Anthropic only

decisions.title: Optional Redis Stack semantic cache
decisions.context: Repeated similar estimation requests can be expensive; vector similarity can reuse validated structured outputs.
decisions.decision: Feature-flagged semantic cache with Redis RediSearch, log-only rollout default, and guarded writes when safe_to_cache is true.
consequences: Compose includes redis service by default
Cache correctness depends on bucket, prompt versions, and thresholds
Misconfiguration can serve stale estimates if enforce mode enabled too early

decisions.title: Split React web UI from FastAPI backend
decisions.context: Streamlit was replaced with a maintainable browser workbench and Docker-static hosting.
decisions.decision: web/ package uses React + Vite + TypeScript; production image serves static assets via nginx; API remains separate service.
consequences: CORS configuration required for local dev
VITE_API_BASE_URL baked at Docker build time
Two deployment units in Compose

decisions.title: Jinja2 prompt bundles for v2
decisions.context: Structured v2 prompts need composable partials and version directories.
decisions.decision: Resolve templates from app/prompts/estimation/{version}/ via PromptRenderer and prompt_versions.py.
consequences: Prompt version selectable via PROMPT_ESTIMATION_VERSION
Template errors fail at render time

decisions.title: Docker Compose as default full-stack local runtime
decisions.context: Learners and reviewers should run API, UI, and Redis without local Python/Node toolchain.
decisions.decision: docker-compose.yml defines redis, app, web, and optional redisinsight with documented ports.
consequences: app depends_on redis for semantic cache exercises
Secrets still supplied via host .env
Production topology not specified in this repository

decisions.title: Explicit API versioning under /api/v1 and /api/v2
decisions.context: v1 Markdown API must remain available while v2 structured API evolves.
decisions.decision: Separate routers in app/routers/ mounted with distinct prefixes in app/main.py.
consequences: Clients choose contract per path
Duplicate estimation logic paths until v1 deprecation
